name: Smashed Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a large pot and add enough cold water to cover generously.
2. Add a generous pinch of salt. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat slightly to prevent boil-over.
3. Continue boiling until tender when pierced with a fork, 35-40 minutes for medium potatoes.
4. Drain and let cool to room temperature.
5. Peel and finely chop eggs into a bowl. Mash slightly with a fork.
6. In a separate bowl, stir together mayonnaise, mustard, sugar, vinegar, pepper, paprika, sweet pickle relish, scallion, parsley, and 2 tablespoons of salt.
7. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
8. Peel potatoes and cut into chunks. Place in the large bowl with eggs.
9. Smash the potatoes with a fork or potato masher to achieve a texture between mashed and chunky.
10. Pour the dressing over the potatoes and stir until evenly blended.
11. Cover and chill for several hours or overnight.
12. To serve, turn out onto a platter or serving bowl. Sprinkle lightly with additional paprika and garnish with parsley sprigs.
13. Serve cold.
